title: Oon Tien

'''Oon Tien''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Jarell]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Discovered by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] colonists [[292 BBY|roughly 300 years]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was settled by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The native Jarell [[King/Legends|monarchies]] traded with the new Human settlers, acquiring weapons and high technology that fueled a change in Jarell society. In the decades preceding the Galactic Civil War, Oon Tien was integrated into the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], and became a major manufacturing and [[Farm/Legends|agricultural]] hub.

With Oon Tien falling under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the sector, established [[Shipyard/Legends|stardocks]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet, resulting in Oon Tien becoming the center of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|fleet's]] construction and maintenance operations. Oon Tien remained under Sarne's control after the Moff declared himself a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Sarne's sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|fell]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. As Sarne retreated, he ordered Governor [[Manon Flint]] to hold the docks at all costs from New Republic aggression. The planet would prove problematic to the New Republic as it sought to expand its influence throughout the sector.

==Description==
Oon Tien was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Oon Tien system/Legends|Oon Tien system]]<ref name="DarkStryder note" /> in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="tdc" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> Oon Tien was connected by [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|travel routes]] to the [[Torize system/Legends|Torize]], [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill]], and [[Corjain system/Legends|Corjain systems]],<ref name="tdc" /> placing it just off the [[Trition Trade Route]].<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Torize]] was fourteen [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] travel from Oon Tien, [[Kolatill]] was nineteen hours distant, and travel to [[Corjain]] took eleven hours. A [[Water/Legends|wet]],<ref name="tdc" /> water-covered,<ref name="CSWE" /> and [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] planet, Oon Tien was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Jarell]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. As the world was integrated into the economy of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], it became a major [[Farm/Legends|agricultural]] and manufacturing center. After coming under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule, the planet was home to the largest [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] in the sector as [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]—ruler of the Kathol sector both as an Imperial official, and later, as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]—had three stardocks established in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. As the planet was a major maintenance hub for his [[Moff Sarne's forces|fleet]], Sarne protected the Oon Tien [[Star system/Legends|system]] with at least two dozen [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]], a full [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], and hundreds of [[Proton mine/Legends|proton mines]].<ref name="tdc" />

==History==
[[File:Tritiontraderoute.jpg|thumb|left|The Trition Trade Route, with Oon Tien located on a spur off from Torize]]
The native Jarells established a primitive society on the planet based around feudal [[King/Legends|monarchic]] [[City/Legends|city]]-states, and had developed basic metalworking skills when [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ships]] discovered the system around [[292 BBY]]. [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists settled on the planet, building several communities and existing side-by-side with the native Jarell city-states. The Jarell monarchs began trading precious gemstones and periods of indentured servitude of their young for weapons and high technology from the Human settlers. The traded equipment assisted the Jarells in a series of internal revolutions that changed Jarell society, although the conflicts never threatened the Human settlements.<ref name="tdc" />

For several decades before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Oon Tien became more integrated into the Kathol sector, with several large manufacturing complexes being established on the planet. The world also developed an extensive agricultural industry. When Oon Tien came under the control of the Galactic Empire, Moff Kentor Sarne appointed [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Manon Flint]] to command the system. Sarne established three orbiting stardocks in the system, each capable of servicing and repairing [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] up to 300 meters long. The docks were the main maintenance facilities for Sarne's forces, and were the largest shipyards in the sector. Oon Tien became part of Sarne's holdings when the Moff broke from the Empire in the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and declared himself a warlord.<ref name="tdc" />

Following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|fall]] of the sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]]<ref name="tsb">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' takes place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Sarne was forced to retreat into the Kathol sector.<ref name="tsb" /> Sarne ordered Governor Flint to hold the docks at all costs, or destroy them if the New Republic managed to invade the system. As the New Republic spread its influence throughout the sector, Oon Tien would prove to be one of the most troublesome planets as it was too heavily defended by Imperial loyalists to fall easily or quickly.<ref name="tdc" />

==Locations==
Oon Tien was home to several settlements of both Jarell and Human origin. The most notable installations on the planet were actually in orbit—the three stardocks that were the hub of the Empire's fleet construction and maintenance programs in the sector. Due to the presence of industrial and agricultural based corporations, Oon Tien had extensive manufacturing and farming complexes on the surface.<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oon Tien was described in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].
